title: pilosella auriculoides subsp. mira
intro: Pilosella auriculoides subsp. mira, also known as a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella auriculoides subsp. mira include its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever, as well as its potential to help with digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pilosella auriculoides subsp. mira can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
